title: potentilla pensylvanica f. longepilosa
intro: Potentilla pensylvanica f. longepilosa, also known as a perennial variety of cinquefoil, is a flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Potentilla pensylvanica f. longepilosa include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
